llm_name: Modified Nearest Neighbor with Local Search and Candidate Restriction (MNNLS-CR)
mechanism: candidate-list nearest-neighbour with closest full-distance fallback and bounded random segment-reversal repair
direct_translation_note: The C++ method C1b_candidate_iter005_mnnls_cr directly translates the Python code without changing the mechanism. The added counters only instrument which branch was taken and how many repair attempts were accepted.
